summary: Completed testing of 6 user-reported bugs. ALL 6 BUGS ARE FIXED. 13/13 backend tests PASSED. All frontend UI tests PASSED. Verified: Cash/Card totals in reports, User Management tab with existing users, Banknote icon on POS, offline warning code, 2AM business day reset, quick range buttons + PDF download.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 user-reported bugs have been verified as FIXED: 1) Cash/Card totals display correctly in Reports (stat-cash-total, stat-card-total data-testids), 2) User Management tab shows 14 existing users with Add User button, 3) POS uses Banknote icon instead of DollarSign, 4) Login.js has offline warning with WifiOff icon (visible when browser offline), 5) Order History defaults to today_only=true with '2:00 AM' reset message, 6) Reports has Today/7d/30d/90d quick buttons + PDF download via blob URL.

bug_1_cash_card_totals.details: Reports page shows Cash and Card total stats with correct values. Backend returns cash_total and card_total fields.

bug_2_user_management.details: Tab renamed to 'User Management'. Shows 14 existing users. Add User button works. Staff endpoint excludes password fields.

bug_3_dollar_symbol_pos.details: POS payment dialog uses Banknote icon (SVG) instead of DollarSign. No $ symbol found in page content.

bug_4_offline_warning.details: Login.js has offline warning implementation with WifiOff icon, red banner, and disabled login button. Only visible when browser is offline.

bug_5_order_history_reset.details: Order History defaults to today_only=true. Shows 'resets at 2:00 AM' subtitle. Backend filters orders by 2AM business day.

bug_6_reports_quick_buttons.details: Reports page has Today, 7 Days, 30 Days, 90 Days quick range buttons. Custom date range with Apply button. PDF download via blob URL.

frontend_tests.pos_banknote_icon: PASSED - DollarSign not found, Banknote used
